content: In your first reply, name TWO things: (1) every memory entry currently in the INDEX.md (just the titles, no need to read the files), and (2) ONE non-obvious convention in the tester repo that is NOT already captured in memory — cite the file path. Then follow the per-task memory artifacts protocol: write .kody/tasks/A78F408A-364B-4DCB-B005-CD360ABBB8D3/context.json and .kody/tasks/A78F408A-364B-4DCB-B005-CD360ABBB8D3/memory-recs.json with the non-obvious convention as a high-confidence rec.

Done. Both artifacts written.

**Memory entries (INDEX.md):**
1. No bullet points
2. Three different role systems coexist

**Non-obvious convention (not yet in memory):**
`kody.config.json:testRequirements` — every `src/app/api/**/route.ts` must have a sibling `{name}.test{ext}` file. Only `health/route.ts` currently complies; 14 other API routes are in violation. This is a hard engine gate, not advisory lint.
